message:
feat(test): add proptest_search_bridge with 30 property-based tests

Cover BridgeCancellationToken state machine (monotonicity, clone sharing,
concurrent safety), SearchBridgeRequest builder composition, update_best_results
phase selection, map_search_error priority ordering, and async cancellation futures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
